title: Ukraine Turns to Europe as U.S. Steps Back as Mediator in Peace Talks
summary_full: President Volodymyr Zelensky traveled to London to meet with the leaders of Britain, Germany and France, who he said could be negotiators in talks with Russia.
summary_public: President Volodymyr Zelensky traveled to London to meet with the leaders of Britain, Germany and France, who he said could be negotiators in talks with Russia.
